content.full_text:
March 9, 2005

Diana Zavala
Executive Assistant
Michael J. Arnold and Associates, Inc.
1127 Eleventh Street, Suite 820
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-031

Dear Ms. Zavala:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of March 9, 2005, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me at 916/322-5660.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
